examples: Therefore, it was inferred that the hemagglutinin might be a glycoprotein on the virus capsid.
After the DNA is inside the capsid, the motor falls off, and a virus tail attaches to the capsid.
Capsomere got its name by being kernel-like, the viral capsid of which consists of nucleoprotein.
Nonoxynol-9 was also originally thought to disrupt that capsid, or covering, of the HIV viral particle.
